Notice Of Deft'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Michael Tcheng, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Amy Swan
Claudia Lozano, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Frank Castanheira

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Amy Swan's motion to quash subpoenas is Granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is granted as to the subpoenas directed to the San Francisco Adult Probation Department, New College of San Francisco, and San Jose High Academy. The subpoena to Farmers Insurance Company is modified to only require production of non-privileged documents regarding prior motor vehicle accidents.

All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Nmtn And Mtn Of Plntf For An Order Compelling Production Of Documents Req. At The Deposition Of Amy Swan; Etc
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Claudia Lozano, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Frank Castanheira
Michael Tcheng, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Amy Swan

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Plaintiff Frank Castanheira's motion for an order compelling production of documents at deposition and further responses to questions as to defendant Amy Swan.
Request for production of documents is Granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is denied as to requests #5 and 11 as the requests are irrelevant to the subject matter and violate the defendant's right to privacy. The motion is granted as to request #10.
Deposition questions is Denied.
The requests are irrelevant to the subject matter and violate the defendant's right to privacy.
All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATION: Permitting plaintiff to submit up to 5 written questions inquiring as to nay post-accident physical treatment. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Set For Trial On Feb-04-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-23-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 210

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Off Calendar
